meta.notes: Initialized from layered FFA inheritance policy. Updated via Claude migration reconciliation v0.2. Added final stabilized atomic homebuyer JTBD set v0.3.

canonical_terms.cognitive_frame: user meaning-making frame/context for a job
canonical_terms.execution_mode: strategy/stance used to execute tasks under constraints

assumptions.title: Pressure-protection framing improves comprehension
assumptions.description: Users reason better with pressure-vs-protection framing than with a single composite score.

seed_metadata.probe_intent: Validate comprehension and confidence deltas in guided sessions.

assumptions.title: Five-band interpretation is user-usable
assumptions.description: The fragile-reactive-managing-stable-resilient ladder is understandable and stable enough for repeated use.

seed_metadata.probe_intent: Assess whether users can explain their own state using band language.

assumptions.title: Default proxy rates are directionally acceptable
assumptions.description: Default withholding, tax, insurance, and PMI assumptions are acceptable directional proxies for early-stage planning.

seed_metadata.probe_intent: Measure model sensitivity to defaults vs user-provided overrides.

assumptions.superseded_reason: Default rate assumptions require reconciliation with active property-tax discrepancy and calibration backlog.

assumptions.title: Dual-constraint purchase roof is actionable
assumptions.description: Income-payment and down-payment constraints jointly define a useful purchase ceiling for users.

seed_metadata.probe_intent: Confirm users can identify and act on the limiting factor.

hypotheses.title: Pattern narrative improves confidence
hypotheses.description: Pattern output (tag, summary, drivers, try) improves user decision confidence compared with score-only output.

seed_metadata.probe_intent: A/B test score-only vs score+pattern guidance.

hypotheses.title: Stress toggles increase realism
hypotheses.description: Offer-mode stress toggles produce user states that better match perceived real-world pressure.

seed_metadata.probe_intent: Compare perceived realism between toggle-enabled and static flows.

hypotheses.title: Limiting-factor clarity reduces confusion
hypotheses.description: Explicitly labeling whether income or down payment is limiting reduces affordability interpretation errors.

seed_metadata.probe_intent: Track user correction rate after limiting-factor explanation.

hypotheses.title: LEI predicts felt stability better than DTI-only
hypotheses.description: LEI combined with clearing metrics predicts user-reported monthly stability better than DTI alone.

seed_metadata.probe_intent: Correlate LEI outputs with user month-end stability ratings.

hypotheses.title: Users confuse down payment with total cash needed to buy a home
hypotheses.description: Buyers conflate 'down payment' with the total cash required. The real picture has two timing layers: (1) Cash at closing = down payment + closing costs (lender fees, title, appraisal, attorney — typically 2-5% of purchase price). (2) Cash before closing = earnest money deposit, inspection fees, appraisal deposit, rate lock fees, and other incentives or pre-close costs that come due during the contract period (often 30-90 days before close). The total cash outlay and its timing are both sources of confusion. A buyer liquidating assets (e.g., selling stock) needs to know not just the total amount but when each piece is needed. Current UI only shows 'Down Payment Sources' — missing closing costs, prepaids, and the pre-close cash timeline entirely.

seed_metadata.probe_intent: Test whether a cash timeline view (what's needed and when) reduces surprise and improves liquidity planning for buyers who need to convert assets to cash.
seed_metadata.user_story: Troy's experience: closing took two months, needed to sell stock to fund purchase, didn't know when each cash amount was due. The total number wasn't enough — timing mattered.

hypotheses.title: Showing closing cost funding alongside down payment sources clarifies total cash picture
hypotheses.description: Placing a 'Closing Cost Funding' section directly next to 'Down Payment Sources' may naturally educate buyers that down payment ≠ total cash needed. By making closing costs visible in the same UI context, users discover the distinction through the interface rather than through surprise at the closing table. Additionally, excess down payment (when income-limited) should list 'cover closing costs' as one of the strategy options — it's a natural use of surplus cash that reduces total out-of-pocket at close.

seed_metadata.probe_intent: Test whether placing closing cost funding adjacent to down payment sources reduces the down-payment-equals-total-cash misconception. Secondary: does adding 'cover closing costs' as an excess DP strategy option increase perceived usefulness of the excess DP guidance?
seed_metadata.design_implication: Excess DP strategy radios should include an option like 'Apply to closing costs' alongside existing options (reduce loan, increase reserves, etc.).

hypotheses.title: Reframe 'Down Payment Sources' as 'Upfront Cash Sources' with itemized breakdown
hypotheses.description: Instead of treating down payment and closing costs as separate concepts the user has to reconcile, reframe the entire section as 'Upfront Cash Sources' — the total pool of liquid cash available for the purchase. The breakdown in the description shows where it goes: down payment, closing costs (2-5%), prepaid escrow, and pre-close costs (earnest money, inspections, etc.). The engine then computes a 'down payment ceiling' from this total pool after subtracting estimated closing costs and prepaids. When upfront cash exceeds what's needed, the overflow is visible. When it falls short, the user sees exactly which component is underfunded. This reframe means the user enters one honest number — 'how much cash can I bring?' — and the system allocates it, rather than asking the user to mentally separate down payment from everything else.

seed_metadata.probe_intent: Test whether a single 'Upfront Cash Sources' input with system-allocated breakdown produces better cash planning accuracy than separate down payment + closing cost inputs.
seed_metadata.design_implication: UI section becomes 'Upfront Cash Sources' with itemized allocation: Down Payment ($X), Closing Costs (~$Y), Prepaids (~$Z), Pre-Close Costs (~$W). The down payment ceiling is derived, not entered. Excess/shortfall is shown against the full picture, not just down payment.

experiments.title: Pattern panel on/off test
experiments.description: Measure confidence and completion effects when the pattern panel is present vs absent in Decision Rehearsal.

seed_metadata.probe_intent: Collect completion and confidence deltas by variant.

experiments.title: Default slider personalization test
experiments.description: Compare fixed defaults to mode-personalized defaults to evaluate faster user orientation and lower reset behavior.

seed_metadata.probe_intent: Track first-adjustment latency and reset frequency.

experiments.title: Walk-away threshold prompt test
experiments.description: Introduce an explicit walk-away threshold prompt in offer mode and measure impact on high-attachment/high-pressure outcomes.

seed_metadata.probe_intent: Measure changes in pattern distribution and self-reported regret risk.

experiments.title: LEI diary validation
experiments.description: Validate LEI and clearing metrics against user-labeled month-end stability diary outcomes.

seed_metadata.probe_intent: Establish practical thresholds for low/medium/high elasticity.

cognitive_frames.title: Steadiness under pressure
cognitive_frames.description: A frame for evaluating whether current conditions support clear, non-reactive decisions.

seed_metadata.probe_intent: Validate whether users can self-identify steadiness state.

cognitive_frames.title: Constraint balancing
cognitive_frames.description: Purchase decisions should be framed as balancing income-payment and equity constraints, not maximizing one variable.

seed_metadata.probe_intent: Test whether users articulate both constraints in scenario reviews.

cognitive_frames.title: Liquidity as adaptability
cognitive_frames.description: Liquidity is treated as the capacity to absorb volatility and reallocate, not merely a static cash surplus.

seed_metadata.probe_intent: Evaluate whether LEI framing improves behavior under shocks.

execution_modes.title: Explore
execution_modes.description: Clarify mode for understanding pressure, direction, and readiness before committing.

seed_metadata.probe_intent: Confirm users stay in exploratory mode before narrowing.

execution_modes.title: Compare
execution_modes.description: Location mode for evaluating support-strain tradeoffs across options.

seed_metadata.probe_intent: Measure option quality discrimination in compare mode.

execution_modes.title: Commit with guardrails
execution_modes.description: Offer mode for commitment decisions with explicit protections and walk-away power.

seed_metadata.probe_intent: Validate whether explicit safeguards reduce reactive commitments.

workflow_patterns.title: Score-to-pattern decision loop
workflow_patterns.description: Collect slider/toggle state, compute resource-demand score, map to band, then surface pattern guidance.

seed_metadata.probe_intent: Check whether guidance changes user follow-up actions.

workflow_patterns.title: Budget-to-price bounded solve
workflow_patterns.description: Use bounded binary search from monthly budget constraints to derive feasible purchase price.

seed_metadata.probe_intent: Verify convergence quality and user trust in outputs.

workflow_patterns.title: Reserve-clearing elasticity loop
workflow_patterns.description: Model reserves, charge clearing, and redistribution to derive liquidity elasticity as a stability signal.

seed_metadata.probe_intent: Test actionable LEI-driven interventions.

tasks.title: Unify DR canon between prototype and TS engine
tasks.description: Eliminate drift risk between legacy v9 JavaScript logic and `lib/decision-rehearsal-engine.ts` contracts.

seed_metadata.probe_intent: Document and close any formula or threshold differences.

tasks.title: Wire custom tax rate into active calculations
tasks.description: Connect `customTaxRateInput` to the actual property-tax path in affordability calculations.

seed_metadata.probe_intent: Ensure user tax overrides materially change outputs.

tasks.title: Migrate income roof to finance-core solver
tasks.description: Replace inline `incomeBasedRoof` logic with canonical solver calls from `finance-core.ts`.

seed_metadata.probe_intent: Prove no behavioral regression across representative scenarios.

tasks.title: Add manual regression fixtures for core decision math
tasks.description: Create repeatable fixtures for DR band outputs and LEI sanity checks using existing script-based validation.

seed_metadata.probe_intent: Detect drift in formulas before release.

tasks.title: Clarify readiness before commitment
tasks.description: When facing a housing/life change, help the user assess if they are steady enough to explore without forcing commitment.

seed_metadata.probe_intent: Validate whether users defer commitment when readiness is low.

tasks.job_statement: When I am considering a housing/life change, help me know whether I am steady enough to explore before committing.
tasks.success_signal: User can state current readiness band and one stabilizing next step before commitment.
tasks.superseded_reason: Replaced by atomic final homebuyer JTBD set HB-JOB-001..HB-JOB-023.

tasks.title: Compare locations for sustainability
tasks.description: When evaluating locations, help the user compare support, volatility, and cost strain rather than excitement alone.

seed_metadata.probe_intent: Measure improvement in tradeoff clarity during location comparisons.

tasks.job_statement: When I compare locations, help me weigh support, volatility, and cost strain rather than excitement alone.
tasks.success_signal: User can explain location choice with explicit support/strain tradeoffs.
tasks.superseded_reason: Replaced by atomic final homebuyer JTBD set HB-JOB-001..HB-JOB-023.

tasks.title: Prepare offers with guardrails
tasks.description: When preparing an offer, help the user maintain boundaries under pressure with protections and walk-away power.

seed_metadata.probe_intent: Assess whether users retain safeguards under high-pressure conditions.

tasks.job_statement: When I prepare an offer, help me keep boundaries under pressure using protections and walk-away criteria.
tasks.success_signal: User defines non-negotiable safeguards and walk-away threshold before offer submit.
tasks.superseded_reason: Replaced by atomic final homebuyer JTBD set HB-JOB-001..HB-JOB-023.

tasks.title: Determine realistic purchase ceiling
tasks.description: When planning a purchase, help the user identify real ceiling from both income-payment and down-payment constraints.

seed_metadata.probe_intent: Check whether users correctly identify the limiting factor.

tasks.job_statement: When I set a purchase target, help me identify the real ceiling from both income-payment and down-payment constraints.
tasks.success_signal: User can identify limiting factor and real purchase roof without confusion.
tasks.superseded_reason: Replaced by atomic final homebuyer JTBD set HB-JOB-001..HB-JOB-023.

tasks.title: Run scenario what-if planning
tasks.description: When life inputs change, help the user model cashflow impacts across income, debts, expenses, and down payment sources.

seed_metadata.probe_intent: Measure scenario iteration frequency and decision confidence gains.

tasks.job_statement: When life inputs shift, help me run what-if scenarios across income, debt, expense, and down-payment sources.
tasks.success_signal: User runs at least two scenarios and compares resulting ceiling and margin.
tasks.superseded_reason: Replaced by atomic final homebuyer JTBD set HB-JOB-001..HB-JOB-023.

tasks.title: Understand housing-system interdependencies
tasks.description: When decision pressure feels ambiguous, help the user see how lifestyle, finance strain, risk, and stability influence each other.

seed_metadata.probe_intent: Evaluate whether systems framing reduces confusion and reactive choices.

tasks.job_statement: When pressure feels ambiguous, help me see interdependencies among lifestyle pull, risk, finance strain, and stability.
tasks.success_signal: User can name key drivers and one leverage point for reducing instability.
tasks.superseded_reason: Replaced by atomic final homebuyer JTBD set HB-JOB-001..HB-JOB-023.

tasks.title: Manage post-purchase liquidity resilience
tasks.description: When ongoing obligations and volatility accumulate, help the user keep reserves, clearing, and reallocation healthy.

seed_metadata.probe_intent: Validate LEI-driven interventions for monthly stability.

tasks.job_statement: When post-purchase volatility rises, help me keep reserves, clearing integrity, and reallocation healthy.
tasks.success_signal: LEI and clearing indicators remain above agreed threshold for consecutive periods.
tasks.superseded_reason: Replaced by atomic final homebuyer JTBD set HB-JOB-001..HB-JOB-023.

seed_metadata.probe_intent: Confirm users pause or proceed appropriately based on band/pattern output.

desired_outcomes.title: Differentiate ceiling from sustainability
desired_outcomes.description: Users can distinguish affordability ceiling from ongoing monthly sustainability margin.

seed_metadata.probe_intent: Reduce misinterpretation of maximum price as recommended price.

desired_outcomes.title: Mitigate commitment pressure pre-offer
desired_outcomes.description: Users can detect and mitigate attachment/urgency pressure before submitting offers.

seed_metadata.probe_intent: Measure reduction in reactive offer behavior.
